textByHashes.f504fa7cece0d68ad86e18e5a6c2f8b09c209309: Hello. I'm the flax keeper. I tend to the flax fields, keeping the yield and continued flax harvest healthy.
textByHashes.f9e7082021fbbdb6486f7180b4d83d38dcf00808: Thank you. I must get back to work. You never know when a great flax harvest will begin!
textByHashes.10314bba86ead302bc505ecb72bcc2c4cdd6af61: Hello. Do you want to exchange some flax banknotes for bowstrings? I'll exchange for you today, and you can come back tomorrow for more.
textByHashes.3b165d9d31a3ae2966ee1c4a995f09d0115d839f: Oh. Well, if you fetch that many flax banknotes, I'll swap them for bowstrings for you.
textByHashes.d8ff35cbe27fcbdce76b49906a54222e6ec32543: Um... Actually, you seem to have so much stuff that you can't hold the bowstrings.
textByHashes.094dc741a229d4802032e5d486660571ee11d97e: Hello again. I'm afraid I won't be able to exchange any more flax for bowstrings today. Try me again tomorrow.
textByHashes.557be63433b9f725d7fa633f71ee9cb81020fe99: Today I can exchange flax banknotes for bowstrings, if you bring me enough flax banknotes.
textByHashes.cf999071009cf356b11ac61815617d61e756c5a2: Sorry, your inventory's too full of stuff.
textByHashes.ab512efa8593ad55a8507f8574a0fc65125bbe0b: I have a question for you.
textByHashes.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
